picks.title: SJSU Opera Theatre presents a Double Bill: La Voix Humaine and Stuck Elevator at Hammer Theatre Center
picks.why: Free opera about a food deliveryman trapped in an elevator—darkly funny and genuinely unusual theater.

picks.title: U.S. Women's National Team v Japan presented by The Home Depot
picks.why: US Women's Soccer vs. Japan at PayPal Park—rare international match featuring the world's best female athletes.

picks.title: San Francisco Shakespeare Festival Presents Julius Caesar
picks.why: Shakespeare's Julius Caesar performed free in Cupertino—professional-quality drama you'd normally pay $40+ to see.
